_meta.what: 热层调度节拍 (hot layer): ScheduleSpec[] fed verbatim to the maestro Scheduler. Editing cadence = editing this file, zero code changes. Fire bookkeeping lives in the ledger (sched:{id}:{fireAt} idempotency keys), so the daily CI run recovers and compensates whatever it missed since the last run (catchUp latest).
_meta.clock: dailyAt is UTC. 07:00 UTC = 北京 15:00 档; the testbed-patrol cron runs 07:20 UTC so the day's fire points are just-missed and compensated on arrival — deliberately exercising the missed-fire path every single day.
_meta.constraint: spec ids must not contain ':' (session-id separator, validateSpec enforces).
